description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on the test stage using three jobs: r-base, r-devel, and r-oldrel. Use a global before_script that runs apt-get update -qq, installs libmagick++-dev, installs libcurl4-openssl-dev libssh2-1-dev libssl-dev git, installs qpdf pandoc pandoc-citeproc, installs libxml2-dev, and sets the environment variables _R_CHECK_CRAN_INCOMING_=FALSE and _R_CHECK_FORCE_SUGGESTS_=TRUE. The r-base job uses the r-base:latest image and executes Rscript -e 'install.packages(c("devtools", "roxygen2", "covr"))', then Rscript -e 'devtools::install_dev_deps()', Rscript -e 'devtools::check()', and Rscript -e 'covr::codecov(type = "all", quiet = FALSE)'. The r-devel job uses the rocker/drd:latest image and runs RDscript -e 'install.packages(c("devtools", "roxygen2"))', RDscript -e 'devtools::install_dev_deps()', and RDscript -e 'devtools::check()'. The r-oldrel job allows failure, uses the r-base:3.4.3 image, and runs the same three Rscript commands as r-devel (install.packages, devtools::install_dev_deps, devtools::check). All jobs are tagged with docker and a CODECOV_TOKEN variable is defined for code coverage uploads.
